root.name: Recon Slasher
侦查伐木
root.description: Recon Slasher fits, safe to traverse 3 layers
用于侦查任务的伐木，可安全速通三层

branch.fit: [Slasher] [low] Overdrive Injector System II Overdrive Injector System II [med] Small Shield Extender II Small Shield Extender II 5MN Y-T8 Compact Microwarpdrive Medium Shield Extender II [rig] Small Core Defense Field Extender I Small Core Defense Field Extender I Small Core Defense Field Extender I
